nasb.text: Now in the days of Joiakim, the priests, the heads of fathers’ households were: of Seraiah, Meraiah; of Jeremiah, Hananiah;

esv.text: And in the days of Joiakim were priests, heads of fathers’ houses: of Seraiah, Meraiah; of Jeremiah, Hananiah;

cnv.text: 在約雅金的日子，祭司作族長的，屬西萊雅族的，有米拉雅；屬耶利米族的，有哈拿尼雅；

ccb.text: 在约雅金时代，祭司家族的族长有西莱雅家族的米拉雅，耶利米家族的哈拿尼雅，
